title: AuthPermissions has no way to inspect bits from Rust
description: auth.rs: AuthPermissions wraps whAuthPermissions but exposes no Rust-visible constants for individual permission bits. The doc says to use wolfHSM C macros but does not cite the header file or macro names. A contributor who wants to check or set a specific permission bit has no starting point without reading C headers manually. Add at minimum a doc cross-reference to the wolfHSM wh_user.h header and the WH_AUTH_PERM_* macro names, so the workflow for setting permissions is self-contained in the Rust docs.
